text: In a competitive science trivia round, which fact correctly matches photosphere?
answers: mechanical wave that travels through matter
visible surface layer of the Sun
bending of waves as they enter a new medium
stream of charged particles released by the Sun
correctAnswer: visible surface layer of the Sun
explanation: The correct match for photosphere is: visible surface layer of the Sun.
